name: Cathedral Rocks
current_developer: JV Cathedral Rock Investments Pty Ltd  - Acciona Energy Australia Global Pty Ltd and EnergyAustralia Pty Ltd
notable: 66 MW, 33 Vestas V80-2.0 MW turbines on the Eyre Peninsula, SA. 50/50 JV between EnergyAustralia and ACCIONA Energy. Construction started 2004; fully operational 2007.

timeline.title: EPBC Referral 2003/1051
timeline.detail: Cathedral Rocks Wind Farm — Not Controlled Action (Particular Manner)

timeline.title: Construction commenced
timeline.detail: Acciona/Hydro Tasmania began construction on Eyre Peninsula

timeline.title: Commercial operations commenced
timeline.detail: Commencement date from AEMO registration via OpenElectricity.

timeline.title: First generation recorded
timeline.detail: First market dispatch data recorded in AEMO systems.
